member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Platform.AndroidPasskeyService
member.summary: Placeholder for when Android-specific code is not being compiled.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Platform.IOSPasskeyService
member.summary: Placeholder for when iOS-specific code is not being compiled.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Platform.WindowsPasskeyService
member.summary: Windows implementation of passkey service using Windows Hello via WebAuthn API. Requires Windows 10 1903 or later with Windows Hello configured. Uses Windows Credential Manager for secure credential storage.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Platform.WindowsPasskeyService.RegisterAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Registers a new passkey using Windows Hello biometric authentication.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Platform.WindowsPasskeyService.AuthenticateAsync(System.Byte[],System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Authenticates using a previously registered passkey with Windows Hello.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Platform.NullPasskeyService
member.summary: Fallback implementation when no platform-specific passkey service is available. Always returns false for IsSupported and throws exceptions on operations.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Platform.Windows.WindowsActiveWindowDetector
member.summary: Windows implementation for detecting active window context using Win32 APIs

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Platform.Windows.WindowsAutoTypeService
member.summary: Windows implementation using SendInput API for realistic keyboard simulation

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Platform.Services.IActiveWindowDetector
member.summary: Platform-specific service for detecting the active window and extracting context

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Platform.Services.IActiveWindowDetector.GetCurrentContext
member.summary: Gets the current active window context
member.returns: Context information about the active window

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Platform.Services.IActiveWindowDetector.IsActiveBrowser
member.summary: Checks if the active window is a supported browser

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Platform.Services.IActiveWindowDetector.TryGetBrowserUrl
member.summary: Attempts to extract URL from active browser window

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Platform.Services.IAutoTypeService
member.summary: Platform-specific service for typing credentials into forms

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Platform.Services.IAutoTypeService.TypeCredentialsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Types a simple username + password sequence
member.param: Whether to press Enter after password

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Platform.Services.IAutoTypeService.TypeCustomSequenceAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
M:PhantomVault.Platform.Services.IAutoTypeService.TypeTextAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Types text character by character with realistic delays
